tables.description: Subject ID, genotyping platform, gender, race, age, BMI, smoking  status, mean triglyceride level in blood, mean total cholesterol in blood, mean low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood, mean low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood, mean high-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood, enrollment visit placebo pill count compliance (%), visit 1, 2 and 3 simvastatin pill count compliance (%) of Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants involved in the "Cholesterol and Pharmacogenetics (CAP) Study" project.

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age

variables.name: BMI
variables.description: Body Mass Index

variables.name: GenoPlatform
variables.description: Illumina HumanHap genotyping platform HumanHap300k or HumanHap 610k-Quad

variables.name: Race
variables.description: Self-reported race (>=3 of 4 grandparents)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: Smoker
variables.description: Smoking status

variables.name: compliance_EV
variables.description: Enrollment visit placebo pill count compliance (%)

variables.name: compliance_V1
variables.description: Visit 1 (first 2 week period) simvastatin pill count compliance (%)

variables.name: compliance_V2
variables.description: Visit 2 (second 2 week period) simvastatin pill count compliance (%)

variables.name: compliance_V3
variables.description: Visit 3 (third 2 week period) simvastatin pill count compliance (%)

variables.name: mHDLC_SVEV
variables.description: Mean high-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood collected at screening and enrollment visits, mg/dL

variables.name: mHDLC_V2V3
variables.description: Mean high-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood collected at visits 2 & 3 (on simvastatin), mg/dL

variables.name: mLDLC_SVEV
variables.description: Mean low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood collected at screening and enrollment visits, mg/dL

variables.name: mLDLC_V2V3
variables.description: Mean low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in blood collected at visits 2 & 3 (on simvastatin), mg/dL

variables.name: mTC_SVEV
variables.description: Mean total cholesterol level in blood collected at screening and enrollment visits, mg/dL

variables.name: mTC_V2V3
variables.description: Mean total cholesterol level in blood collected at visits 2 & 3 (on simvastatin), mg/dL

variables.name: mTg_SVEV
variables.description: Mean triglyceride level in blood collected at screening and enrollment visits, mg/dL

variables.name: mTg_V2V3
variables.description: Mean triglyceride level in blood collected at visits 2 & 3 (on simvastatin), mg/dL

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, and histological type of samples of participants involved in the "Cholesterol and Pharmacogenetics (CAP) Study" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group of participants involved in the "Cholesterol and Pharmacogenetics (CAP) Study" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID
